meta.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Our running-focused PTs in Seneca help you get back to pain-free miles. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Trampis PT — Run Pain-Free Again | Seneca, SC
index.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Our running-focused PTs in Seneca help you get back to pain-free miles. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Seneca, SC · For runners who refuse to stop
blocks.headline: Get back to running — without pain or the fear it'll come back
blocks.subhead: Runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, Achilles, plantar fasciitis — we find what's actually causing it, fix the mechanics behind it, and build a smart return-to-run plan around your goals.

blocks.headline: Does running keep breaking down on you?
blocks.body: You don't have to choose between your mileage and your body. If any of this sounds familiar, you're exactly who we built this for:
items: The pain shows up again every time you ramp up your mileage
You've been told to just rest, ice, and stop running
Nobody ever looked at how you actually run
You're scared a flare-up will wreck your race or your training block

blocks.headline: If that sounds like your running, we can help.
blocks.body: There's a reason the pain keeps returning — and a clear path back to the miles you love.

blocks.headline: Every week you wait costs you miles

items.title: Losing your hard-earned fitness
items.body: Every week off is endurance, strength, and base mileage slipping away — and a longer road back when you finally return.

items.title: Stuck in the injury cycle
items.body: Rest a week, feel better, run, get hurt again. The cycle never ends because the real cause was never addressed.

items.title: Watching your race slip away
items.body: That goal race or PR you trained for fades further out of reach with every day you can't train consistently.

blocks.headline: Why Trampis PT is different
blocks.intro: We don't hand runners a hot pack and tell them to stop running. We find why your body keeps breaking down and build a plan that gets you back on the road for good.

items.title: Full running gait analysis
items.body: We watch how you actually run and pinpoint the mechanics driving your pain — not just where it hurts.

items.title: A plan built around your goals
items.body: One-on-one care mapped to your races, your weekly mileage, and the training you want to get back to.

items.title: A smart return-to-run progression
items.body: We rebuild your strength and mechanics and ramp you back up the right way — so the pain stays gone.

blocks.headline: Ready to find out why it keeps coming back?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment and gait analysis with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute assessment and gait analysis online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & plan
steps.body: We find the root cause behind your injury and map out exactly how we'll get you running again.

steps.title: Get back to running strong
steps.body: Follow a smart return-to-run progression with a coach in your corner and hit your goals — without fear of re-injury.

blocks.headline: Seneca runners who got their miles back

blocks.headline: Your comeback starts with one step.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 running evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment and gait analysis.
